rootCauseClass: Dashboard calculation + dual metrics paths (not a Firestore data issue; not a KC-0058 soft-delete regression)

whyCountsDiffered.dashboardBefore: Reported Metrics-like Connected/total from Mission Control model using canonical Active unique Karkuns (KC-028A). Stale model after hydrate could show 0/0 and 0% when registry/assignments were empty at first paint, and health KPIs re-read a stale model on assignmentVersion bumps.
whyCountsDiffered.expectedAlignedMeaning: Dashboard Connections label = connected/total where connected = canonical Active unique non-archived Karkuns; total = connected + Available pool. Raw docs (56) remain available as connectionDocumentCount.

after.productionExpected: 46 / (46 + Available pool) with progressPct from same service
